title: Writing — all 7 collections
summary: Editorial lede + collection grid (7 collections with counts + 2 flagship titles each) + recent-pieces list + archive pointer to blog.ninochavez.co.

strategy.decision: Surface all 7 Signal Dispatch collections with counts (blog 229 / whitepapers 12 / series 8 / fiction 10 / presentations 9 / counterpoints 3 / tutorials 3 / research-notes 1) + 2 flagship titles per. Recent-pieces chronological list pulls from the blog's RSS. Archive pointer for full browse.
strategy.why: Synthesis §Writing corpus is the heaviest under-represented surface — v2 surfaced 3 flagships out of ~275 published artifacts. The whitepapers and series and fiction collections were entirely invisible. Per ADR-0009 cluster IA, writing IS a cluster; surfacing all 7 collections is what makes the cluster honest.
strategy.shipped: v2 /writing — editorial lede + 3 flagship whitepaper pointers + 'view archive' link. No surfacing of the other 6 collections.
strategy.gap: Proposed = 7-collection grid with counts and flagships; Shipped = 3 flagships pointing to blog.ninochavez.co.
strategy.question: Does the 7-collection grid feel proportional or does it dilute the thought-leadership signal by treating fiction + tutorials as equal-weight to blog + whitepapers? Consider visual hierarchy within the grid.

currentState.summary: v2 /writing — editorial lede + 3 flagship whitepaper teasers + archive pointer.
currentState.annotation: Expand from 3-flagship view to 7-collection surfacing. Counts source from `apps/blog/astro-build/src/content/<collection>` filesystem — refresh before every push.
